' "All this wilt thou grant unto them, as it lies in thy power, O Ardvi Siira AnAhita T 88. 'Then Ardvi SAra Andhita came forth, O Zarathu5tral down from those stars to the earth made by Mazda; and Ardvi Siira Andhita spake thus:
89. *"0 pure, holy Zarathurtral Ahura Mazda has established thee as the master of the material world: Ahura Mazda has established me to keep the whole of the holy creation.
herds and two-legged men go on, upon the earth : I^ forsooth, keep all good things, made by Mazda, the offspring of the holy principle, just as a shepherd keeps his flock.''

90. * Zarathu^ra asked Ardvi Siira Anihita : " O Ardvi SCira Andhita ! With what manner of sacrifice shaU I worship thee ? With what manner of sacrifice shall I worship and forward thee? So that Mazda may make thee run down (to the earth), that ' The warriors. • To teach. • Doobtfnl.
ABAN YASr. 75 he may not make thee run up into the heavens, above the sun*; and that the Serpent^ may not injure thee with ,...', with ....*, with ....*, and .... poisons*."

91. 'Ardvi Sfira An&hita answered: "O pure, holy Spitama! this is the sacrifice wherewith thou shalt worship me, this is the sacrifice wherewith thou shalt worship and forward me, from the time when the sun is rising to the time when the sun is setting.
who art an Athravan, who hast asked and learnt the revealed law, who art wise, clever, and the Word incarnate.

92. ' " Of this libation of mine let no foe drink, no man fever-sick, no liar, no coward, no jealous one, no woman, no faithful one who does not sing the Githas, no leper to be confined ^ 93. *"I do not accept those . libations that are drunk in my honour by the blind, by the deaf, by the wicked, by the destroyers, by the niggards, by the ....•, nor any of those stamped with those characters which have no strength for the holy Word^ ^ When the beds of the rivers are dry, the cause is that Ardvi Sfira sends up her waters to the higher heavens (to the sun region) instead of sending them down to the earth (cf. p. 73, note 2).
character, the storm-fiend (cf. Vend. Introd. IV, 38 and this Yart, § 39, note). The uncleanness and unhealthiness of the rivers are ascribed to his poison.

94. ' Then Zarathu^tra asked Ardvi Siira Anihita : " O Ardvi SAra Anihita ! What becomes of those libations which the wicked worshippers of the Dadvas bring unto thee after the sun has set*?"

95. * Ardvi S£lra Anfthita answered: "O pure, holy Spitama Zarathu^ral howling, clapping, hopping, and shouting', six hundred and a thousand Dadvas, who ought not to receive that sacrifice*, receive those libations^ that men bring unto me after [the sun has set]*."

96. ' I will worship the height Hukairjra, of the deep precipices ^, made of gold, wherefrom this mine Ardvi Siira Andhita leaps, from a hundred times the height of a man *, while she is possessed of as much Glory as the whole of the waters that run along the earth, and she runs powerfully \ < For her brightness and glory, I will offer her a sacrifice ....

AbAn ya^t. 77 stand vrith baresma in their hands : the Hv6vas did worship her, the Naotaras did worship her^; the Hvdvas asked for riches, the Naotaras asked for swift horses. Quickly was Hvdva blessed with riches and full prosperity ; quickly became Vtn&spai the Naotaride, the lord of the swiftest horses in these countries *.

99. [' Ardvi Sfira An^hita granted them that boon, as they were offering up libations, giving gifts, sacrificing, and entreating that she would grant them that boon*.] ' For her brightness and gloiy, I wDl offer her a sacriiice • • • • XXIII.

loi. ' Who has a thousand cells and a thousand channels : the extent of each of those cells, of each of those channels, is as much as a man can ride in forty days, riding on a good horse*. In each channel there stands a palace, well-founded, shining with a hundred windows, with a thousand columns, well-built, with ten thousand balconies, and mighty.

102. ' In each of those palaces there lies a welllaid, well-scented bed, covered with pillows, and ^ The Hvdva or Hvdgva family plays as great a part in the religious legend, as the Naotara family in the heroic one. Two of the Hvdvas, Frashaoitra and G^mftspa, were among the first disciples of Zarathmtra and the prophet married Frashaojtra's daughter, Hvdgvi (cf. Yt XIII, 139). For the Naotaras, see above, §( 63> 7^* According to the Bundahif , Vtjtdspa did not belong to the Naotara family (XXXI, a8): perhaps he was considered a Naotaride on account of his wife Hutaosa, who was one (Yt XV, 35).
' Spurious. * Cf. $ 4.

Ardvi SAra Andhita, O Zarathu^tra ! runs down there from a thousand times the height of a man, and she is possessed of as much Glory as the whole of the waters tliat run along the eaith, and she runs powerfully ^ XXIV.
103. < Offer up a sacrifice, O Spitama Zarathuxtra ! unto this spring of mine, Ardvi Siira An&hita ....

104. ' Unto her did the holy Zarathurtra offer up a sacrifice in the Airyana Va6^h, by the good river Diitya ; with the Haoma and meat, with the baresma, with the wisdom of the tongue, with the holy spells, with the speech, with the deeds, with the libations, and with the rightly-spoken words*, 105. * He begged of her a boon, saying: *' Grant me this, O good, most beneficent Ardvi S6ra An4hita ! that I may bring the son of Aurva/-aspa ', the valiant Kavi Vlnispa, to think according to the law, to speak according to the law^ to do according to the lawV'
zh: 從妳而得順利的分娩。
「凡此一切，汝所能及者，汝必將賜予彼等，阿爾德未‧絲拉‧阿那希塔啊。」（T 88）「爾後阿爾德未‧絲拉‧阿那希塔自彼等星辰而下，降臨於馬茲達所造之大地，向查拉圖斯特拉而來；阿爾德未‧絲拉‧阿那希塔乃如是言：
89. 「啊，純淨、聖潔的瑣羅亞斯德！阿胡拉‧瑪茲達已立汝為物質世界之主：阿胡拉‧瑪茲達已立我以守護整個聖潔之造物。
牲畜與雙足的人類在大地上行進：而我實則保護一切善物，乃是由智慧之主（Mazda）所造，聖性原則之子嗣，就如牧羊人保護其羊群一般。」
90. 瑣羅亞斯德問阿爾德維‧西拉‧阿尼希塔：「啊，阿爾德維‧西拉‧阿尼希塔！我應以何等祭祀方式來崇拜妳？我應以何等祭祀方式來崇拜並讚頌妳？好使智慧之神（Mazda）得以讓妳流降（至地上），使得戰士們……教導……可疑。」
阿班雅斯（Aban Yasn）75 他可能不會使你奔上天空，超越太陽*；並且那蛇^可能不會用......*、用......*、用......*以及......毒素*傷害你。
91. 阿爾德薇‧斯皮拉‧阿那希妲答道：「純淨而聖潔的斯皮塔瑪啊！這是汝應以之祭祀我的祭祀，這是汝應以之祭祀我並推進我的祭祀，自日出之時起至日落之時止。
汝乃阿塔爾萬（Athravan），汝已詢問並學得啟示之法，汝聰慧、聰敏，乃道言之化身。

92. 「願我此祭酒無人飲用，除非其非敵人、非患熱病者、非說謊者、非懦夫、非嫉妒者、非婦女、非不歌唱《蓋陀》(Githas)之忠信者、非應隔離之癩病患者^ 93. 「我不接受盲人、聾人、邪惡者、毀滅者、吝嗇者、……以我名義飲用之祭酒，亦不接受任何帶有無力於聖言(the holy Word)之特徵者所奉獻之祭酒。^ 當河床乾涸之時，其原因乃阿爾德維‧蘇拉(Ardvi Sfira)將其水送往高天(太陽區域)，而非送往大地(參見第73頁，註2)。
品格，乃是風暴惡魔（參閱《萬德達》導論第四卷第38節及本《雅施特》第39節注）。河流的不潔與不衛生乃歸咎於其毒害。
Arethna，一個 ^a( \ty6iifvop；Vawsaka，亦同。

**不容任何駝背或腹部隆起之人飲用吾之奠酒；不容任何牙齒腐蝕之魔鬼。**
94. 那時瑣羅亞斯德問阿爾迪維‧西拉‧阿尼希塔：「啊，阿爾迪維‧西拉‧阿尼希塔！那些信奉達德瓦斯的惡人在日落之後所獻予妳的祭禮，究竟會如何呢？」
95. * 阿爾德維‧蘇拉‧阿內提塔（Ardvi Sûra Anfthita）回答道：「噢，純淨而神聖的斯皮塔瑪‧瑪羅圖斯特拉（Spitama Zarathu^stra），那些嚎叫、拍擊、蹦跳並呼喊著的六百位以及一千位達瓦人（Dadvas），不應當接受那獻祭*，卻接受了人們在[太陽已西下]*之後呈獻給我的那些奠酒†。」
96. 「我將禮拜高聳的胡凱利雅（Hukairjra）—深谷之地，由黃金所成—吾之阿爾德維‧西拉‧安迪塔（Ardvi Siira Andhita）女神自此處躍下，其高度為人身百倍之處。彼女具有與流經大地之諸水相等之光榮，且奔流洶湧。為其光輝與榮耀，我將奉獻祭祀……」
97. 『噢，斯彼塔馬‧查拉圖斯特拉¹，獻祭於我之泉源，阿爾德維‧蘇拉‧阿尼希塔…… 98. 『在其前，馬茲達的崇拜者們』 （《萬德達經》II, 29）
對於 joj。這些詞語的翻譯並不確定。
^ 本文此處作 visp6-vahmem，*堪受一切祈禱者*；來自《雅什特頌》(Yt. XII, 24) 的讀法 vlspA-vaAmem 似乎更為妥當。
阿班雅特（Abān yāt）。77 手持巴雷斯瑪（baresma）而立：胡德瓦人（Hvdvas）崇拜她，瑙塔拉人（Naotaras）崇拜她；胡德瓦人祈求財富，瑙塔拉人祈求駿馬。胡德瓦人迅速蒙受財富與充足的繁榮之祝福；瑙塔拉人出身的維特那斯帕伊（Vtn&spai）迅速成為此等國度中駿馬最快者的主宰。
99. [『阿爾德維‧斯皮拉‧安希塔（'Ardvi Sîra Anâhita）賜予他們此恩澤，因為他們正獻上奠祭、施捨禮物、進行犧牲，並懇求她賜予他們此恩澤*。』]『為了她的光輝與榮耀，我將向她獻上祭祀 ‧ ‧ ‧ ‧ XXIII。
100. 「斯皮塔瑪（Spitama）啊，向我這泉水獻祭吧，向阿爾德維‧蘇剌‧阿納塔（Ardvi Sûra Anâhita）獻祭……
一百一。『誰有千個房室和千條通道：那些房室中每一個，那些通道中每一個的廣度，就如同一個人騎著良馬可以四十日內騎行的距離*。在每條通道中都矗立著一座宮殿，基礎穩固，以百扇窗戶閃耀光輝，有千根柱子，建造精良，擁有萬座陽台，宏偉壯麗。
